title: Spice of Overhaul
description: Minecraft isn't difficult enough for you? This mod changes food related stuff and food system at all.
body:
# Minecraft isn't difficult enough for you? If so you should try this mod which implements some food related mechanics to make your gameplay more challenging.

### Recommended using along with mods providing huge food variety, such as Farmers Delight or Pam's Harvest Craft 2.
## At this point there are these features:

### -Dynamic food values (restored hunger depends on how much you have eaten this specific item)
### 
### -Eating speed dependency on food stats
### 
### -Well Fed effect affecting regeneration rate
### 
### -Regeneration and exhaustion rate dependency on many circumstances (currently not configurable)
### 
### -Low food/health penalties
### 
### -Apple skin ui support

## Future plans:

### -Full implementation of Hunger Overhaul (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hunger-overhaul) and Spice of Life (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-spice-of-life)




### You can use this mod in your modpacks whilst distributing locally or in curseforge/modrinth projects
